items.title: Manhattan luxury real estate sales hold firm despite fears of a 'Mamdani effect'
items.summary: A month after the passage of a tax on second homes in New York City, brokers and analysts said sales of luxury real estate remain strong.
items.label: other

items.title: Christine Lagarde leaves door open to early ECB exit, as she mulls French politics
items.summary: The European Central Bank's Christine Lagarde has declined to rule out an early end to her term as president, as she mulls a foray into French politics.
items.label: other
